examples: Water rushes out of huge tunnels.
The spider can feel even the smallest movement of the web, and rushes at the insect before it can get away.
Blood rushes to your nose and causes a blockage in it.
Once again, Leszczynski rushes to mount an attack without bothering to check the most basic facts.
"I've learned that everyone always rushes to judgment when they hear news like this, " Aldean said.
